context: Verify that the agent uses the advanced subcommand with author and year-range flags, and qualifies the results as a non-exhaustive sample.

checklist.name: advanced subcommand is used
checklist.description: The agent invokes the script with the 'advanced' subcommand rather than 'search'.

checklist.name: --author flag is set to 'Ilya Sutskever'
checklist.description: The --author flag is passed with the correct author name (case-insensitive).

checklist.name: --year-start and --year-end flags are set
checklist.description: Both --year-start 2017 and --year-end 2021 are passed to the script.

checklist.name: Results are qualified as non-exhaustive
checklist.description: The agent explicitly notes that Google Scholar's year filter is a ranking hint and that results may not include all papers in the range.

checklist.name: Candidate list is returned without auto-triaging
checklist.description: The results are presented to the user as candidates. No triage-paper invocation occurs without confirmation.
